creator: piratensender@gmx.de
text:
The behavior of FRR may be extended or customized using its built-in scripting capabilities.
This is useful to do some FRR scripting with firewalls...
This is possible if the port is build with --enable-scripting
see 
https://docs.frrouting.org/en/latest/scripting.html
for more details.
Please build FRR with --enable-scripting to use Lua.
thy a lot!
